name: n
description: Start a Beads work session with a script-backed deterministic flow.

interface.shortDescription: Run a script-backed Beads startup flow
interface.longDescription: Use N to start a Swarmies work session through one deterministic script: preview the first ready issue, summarize it, and claim that exact issue only on confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Run the N startup script for the next Beads task
Preview the first ready issue and ask whether to claim it
